description: Pre-built component registry for the offline builder's `palette` field. Each entry describes how to reference a component .tox WITHOUT redistributing it (the file loads from the user's own TD install / palette / project at open time via enableexternaltox + externaltox + subcompname) and carries the interface metadata the builder needs to wire it TD-natively: inner root type for the placeholder .n token, inner in-op names/families per input connector (compinputs .network blocks), and inner out-op names per output connector (consumer .n path-form refs like 'name/out1'). Harvested from live TD (wrapper items MUST be live-harvested; offline #1b manifests are only trustworthy for single-COMP-root raw components). Companion to docked_dats.json; PR-reviewable.

derivative.comment: Derivative palette items ship with TD; externaltox is emitted as a parameter EXPRESSION so the path tracks the RUNNING install (machines routinely have several TD versions installed). These .tox are metadata-wrapper shaped: root COMP holds help/icon plus the real component nested under the same name; subcompname loads the inner comp directly and TD retypes the placeholder.

user.comment: User-palette components (My Components). Resolved via TD so OneDrive-redirected Documents folders work; never hardcode a Documents path. Typically raw (non-wrapper): no subcompname.

project.comment: Project-local .tox referenced by a project-relative CONSTANT path (mode 0), keeping the project folder self-contained and portable.

audioAnalysis.purpose: Real-time audio analysis: band levels (low/mid/high), kick/snare detection, rhythm and spectral features exposed as custom parameters and two CHOP outputs.
